<!-- generated by setup-repository-workflow -->
# Delivery profile: strict PR

- One accepted outcome uses one branch and one pull request.
- Use cohesive Conventional Commits; do not force the PR number into every inner commit.
- Run focused local proof before publication. Required CI must observe the changed risk on the fixed PR revision.
- Review the fixed diff on Standards and Spec axes. Automated review is advisory unless the host ruleset requires its approval, resolved threads, or named status.
- Merge only through the repository host policy. Prefer linear history and squash when the host ruleset selects them; the durable squash commit carries `(#PR)`.
- Commit, push, PR, merge, and deployment remain separate authority boundaries.
